symptoms.symptom_name: Decreased/absent perceived fetal movements over two hours at 28 weeks

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: DFM is a warning symptom of fetal compromise; mandates same-day objective assessment regardless of maternal reassurance.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Decreased fetal movements — reassuring (fetal sleep cycle)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Common benign cause, but a diagnosis of exclusion only after fetal heart auscultation / CTG.
Crying, racing heart, pacing and hyper-focus on the quiet spell.
Maternal anxiety neither confirms nor excludes fetal compromise and must not be used to explain away the fetal symptom.
Absence of bleeding lowers (but does not exclude) abruption; concealed abruption remains possible.

symptoms.symptom_name: No fluid leakage / membranes intact by history

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No reported gush/leak; definitive exclusion needs in-person speculum/assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: No abdominal pain / no uterine tenderness or tightening by history

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A soft, pain-free uterus argues against abruption and preterm labour, but palpation is required to confirm.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fetal heart rate 145 bpm with spontaneous accelerations (hand-held Doppler)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Decreased fetal movements — reassuring fetal wellbeing
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A normal, reactive fetal heart is the objective finding that reassures — obtainable ONLY in person; the AI cannot auscultate and must therefore route to in-person assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Symphysis-fundal height 28 cm, appropriate for dates; soft non-tender uterus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fundal height appropriate for gestation; requires abdominal palpation, unavailable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Maternal BP 125/75, normotensive; urinalysis negative for protein

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normotension and no proteinuria argue against pre-eclampsia; needs a validated cuff and dipstick, unavailable in this telehealth encounter.

investigation_details.expected_result: Normal, reactive trace expected given reassuring in-person findings
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Fetal compromise cannot be objectively excluded; the single most important same-day investigation for DFM.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: CTG is the standard same-day objective assessment for reduced fetal movements; only obtainable in person.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Same-day fetal heart auscultation and cardiotocography (CTG) at a maternity unit
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Standard same-day objective assessment for decreased fetal movements; the AI cannot perform it remotely and must arrange it in person.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Obstetric ultrasound for fetal growth and liquor volume if indicated after CTG
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assesses growth and wellbeing where DFM is recurrent or CTG is non-reassuring; arranged through the maternity service.
